zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Radcliffe於大約1340年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，她的父親Sir Richard Radcliffe36歲，母親Isabella de Plessington31歲。她於大約1370年與Ralph de Langton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年在英國威爾斯尼德享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Radcliffe于大约1340年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，她的父亲Sir Richard Radcliffe36岁，母亲Isabella de Plessington31岁。她于大约1370年与Ralph de Langton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1425年在英国威尔斯尼德享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Radcliffe was born about 1340, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Radcliffe, was 36 and her mother, Isabella de Plessington, was 31. She married Ralph de Langton about 1370. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1425, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Radcliffe est née environ 1340, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Radcliffe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Plessington, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Langton environ 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Radcliffe um 1340 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Radcliffe 36 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Plessington 31. Sie hat um 1370 Ralph de Langton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1425 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Ralph de Langton circa 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1425, nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Radcliffeが約1340年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Radcliffeは36歳，母Isabella de Plessingtonは31歳であった。約1370年にRalph de Langtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Radcliffe(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Radcliffe(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Plessington(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 Ralph de Langton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 웨일스 그w이네드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Ralph de Langton aproximadamente 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1425, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Radcliffe родилась около 1340 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Radcliffe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Plessington, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Langton около 1370 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Radcliffe nació aproximadamente 1340, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Radcliffe, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabella de Plessington, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Ralph de Langton aproximadamente 1370. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1425, en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
